     MILITARY GOVERNMENT OF SANTO DOMINGO.
                  Executive Order No. 491.                        *
APPROPRIATION FOR OFFI'CE EIXPENSES OF DEPART-
     MENT O F PUBLIC WORKS FROM JULY 1,1920,
              TO DECEMBER 31, 1920.
    By virtue of the powers vested in the Military Government
of Santo Damingo, there is appropriated from funds of the
National Treasury not otherwise appropriated, the SUM of fifty
thousand dollars ($50,000.00) or so much thereof as may be
necessary to cover the general expenses of the office and field
organization of the Department of Public Works for the period
July 1, 1920, t o December 31, 1920.
                                 THOMAS SNOWDEN,
                               Rear-Admiral, U. S. Navy,
                         Military Governor of S m t o Domingn.
Santo Domingo City, D. R . ,
    June 14, 1920.
